patches.hypothesis: The existing method incorrectly assumes that filterCandidate will handle both filtering and injecting, but injection should occur only if filtering identifies a suitable candidate.
patches.changes:
- mockCandidateFilter.filterCandidate(mocks, field, fieldInstance).thenInject() 
+ if (mockCandidateFilter.filterCandidate(mocks, field, fieldInstance)) { field.setAccessible(true); field.set(fieldInstance, mock); }
patches.diff:
- mockCandidateFilter.filterCandidate(mocks, field, fieldInstance).thenInject() 
+ if (mockCandidateFilter.filterCandidate(mocks, field, fieldInstance)) { field.setAccessible(true); field.set(fieldInstance, mock); }
